title: 幽灵复仇
theme: 民国上海·夏家拳馆命案
synopsis: 民国三年（1914年）立秋前五天，上海闸北夏家拳馆。百年武馆馆主夏三虎被发现死在内宅自己的房间床上。闸北警局内，警方与嫌疑人斗智斗勇。过去所做事，如影随形，生死相伴。
styleGuide: 1914 Republican era Shanghai martial arts school, traditional Chinese architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, mysterious atmosphere

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1914 Shanghai martial arts school murder mystery. Traditional Chinese architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, seven silhouettes in period costumes, mysterious atmosphere
